title: Chicken Nuggets-as they should be
description: This mod gives you the ability to make 4 kinds of chicken nuggets.
body:
This is a food mod that is focused on the lack of chicken nuggets in this world. It is a scam that iron and gold both get their own nugget but chicken is left to fend for itself. There are 5 new food items, 3 advancements, and 21 recipies. 
List of foods:
Bread crumbs
Raw chicken nugget
Cooked chicken nugget
Raw breaded chicken nugget
Cooked breaded chicken nugget
This project was made using MCreator, go check them out.
